The '''Lightning Tech Squadron''' was an elite unit of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Eclipse Team]].<ref name="SWAJ10:WBC" />

[[Kichiir]] the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] was a member.<ref name="SWAJ10:WBC" />
